ranked_scholarships.name: AI & Machine Learning Future Leaders Award
ranked_scholarships.justification: Perfect alignment with Alice's core interests in AI and Machine Learning; 3.8 GPA demonstrates academic excellence for future leadership.

ranked_scholarships.name: Women in Technology Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: Excellent fit as a woman in Computer Science with strong academics (3.8 GPA), supporting her AI/ML tech career goals.

ranked_scholarships.name: Southeast Asia STEM Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: Strong regional match for Malaysian student; CS degree and 3.8 GPA align with ASEAN STEM excellence criteria.

ranked_scholarships.name: STEM Excellence Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: 3.8 GPA and CS major demonstrate STEM excellence; AI, ML, Data Science focus strengthens application foundation.

ranked_scholarships.name: Malaysia Tech Talent Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: Direct nationality match; CS degree and AI/ML interests align with Malaysia's digital economy development priorities.

ranked_scholarships.name: Data Science & Analytics Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: Directly matches stated Data Science interest; CS background and 3.8 GPA support analytical and technical proficiency.

ranked_scholarships.name: Healthcare Innovation Scholarship
ranked_scholarships.justification: Possible if Alice connects AI/ML to healthcare tech, medical data analysis, or clinical decision support applications.
